titleStmt.title: SII 34.28: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 28. Tirumaṇañjēri, Mayiladuturai Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Madhyānēśvara temple.

summary.p: Records that Kūṟṟattaikkumaittār, the wife of Kaṇṇamaṅgalamuḍaiyār Bīmappiḷḷai and daughter of Puliyūrḍaiyāṉ Ādittadēvaṉ Miḻalaināṭṭukkōṉ built the shrine of Tirukkāmakkōṭṭam-uḍaiya-Nāchchiyār and gifted land, which was her sīdana (śrīdhana) property, in Udaiyaṅguḍi a dēvadāna village of the temple, for offerings, lamps, etc in the shrine. She further renovated a monastery (guhai) called Ālālasundara for the use of Pugalivēndar of Pūṇḍi. It is said that the lady borrowed money on hand loan (edirppai) from several places for building the shrine. She also gave some land and house-sites to a Brāhmaṇa priest and two others who helped her in several ways.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīirācarāca tEvarkku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu kaṇṇamaṅkalamuṭaiyār vīmappiḷḷai pāriyai pāti ripuliyūruṭaiyāṉ ĀtittatEvarmiḻalaināṭṭukkOṉār makaḷār kūṟṟattaik kumaittār vattuṭaiyār tiruvetirkoḷpāṭi Uṭaiyārkkut tiruppaḷḷi Aṟai nācciyārai Eḻuntaruḷivikka vEṇumeṉṟu Ivar colli IkkOyil tāṉattāraiyum Utayaṅkuṭaiyārkaḷaiyum Aḻaittu Eṉakku naṉ
t tiruppaḷḷiyaṟai nācciyārai Eḻuntaruḷivikka vēṇumeṉṟu vēṇṭikkoṇṭu nāṉ pala Iṭaṅkaḷilum Etirppai kuṭutta poruḷkaḷ Ivarai Eḻuntaruḷivikka Uṭalākavum Eḻuntaruḷivikka vēṇṭuvatukkum nācciyāṟkku tiruvamutukkuṭalāka Innāyaṉār tēvatāṉam Utaiyaṅkuṭiyil nāṉ cītaṉam peṟṟuṭaiyēṉāy Eṉṉutāy nāṉ Aṉupavittu varukiṟa nilattu Irukaraiyaṉ Eṉṟu pērkūvappaṭṭa nilamāy nāṉ kuṭutta nilaṅkālē ciṉṉamum Eṉakku naṉ
Etirkoḷpāṭiyil kīḻait tiruvītiyil pūṇṭi Uṭaiyār pukalivēntar Irukkiṟa Ālāla cuntaraṉ kukai Eṭuttukkaṭṭi mēyntu cantirātittavarai cellavum Ikkukaikkum Uppukkum cāttukkum viḷakkeṇṇeykkum Ikkukai nōkkukaikkum maṭa māka kuṭutta Utayaṉ kuṭiyil nāṉ cītaṉam peṟṟu Aṉupavittu varukiṟa tāṉṟippaḷḷameṉṟu pēr kūvappaṭṭa nilam Eḻumācciṉṉamum Innilattuṭpaṭṭa tiṭalun teṅkuḷḷiṭṭa maraṅkaḷum kukaikkuṭalākavum pukali vēntaru
tāmē nōkkavum Ivarkkuppiṉpu Ittaṉmam nōkkavallār kaikkoṇṭu nōkkavum vaṭa Utaiyaṉkuṭiyil Eṭṭumāvil kiḻakkaṭaiya Eṉkāṇiyāṉa nilam Orumāvaraiyum Utaiyaṉ kuṭaiyār Akarattu Irukkum pirāmaṇaril tillaimūvāyira nampi makaṉ tirumaṇañcēri Uṭaiyāṉ paṭṭarkku perumpaṟṟappuliyūr nālu tirunāḷum kumpiṭa Innilaṅ kuṭuttēṉeṉṟum Utaiyāṉkuṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampala muṭaiyār cōḻa vēḷārkku naṭuvil teruvil kīḻciṟakil Eṉ maṉaikuḻi muppattaiñcum Imaṉaiyil
teṅkum Ivaṉ Eṉakku vēṇṭuvaṉa cēkaiyālē kuṭuttēṉeṉṟum Ivvūrkkīḻaitteruvil kīḻ ciṟakil kollaṉ pāḻil maṉai kuḻi muppattucciṉṉamum Imaṉaiyil niṉṟa teṅkukaḷum Utaiyaṉ kuṭaiyār Araṅkappiḷḷaikku kuṭuttēṉeṉṟum Ippaṭi kūṟṟattaikkumaittār colla Eḻutiṉēṉ Ālattūruṭaiyāṉ nampi Irāmapirāṉēṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻutteṉṟum Ippaṭik kūṟṟattaikkumaittār coṉṉamaikku Utaiyaṅkuṭaiyāṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ cōḻa vēḷāṉ Eḻutteṉṟum
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ parantavaṉ cōḻa vēḷāṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ vēḷāṉ tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Itu cempaṅkuṭaiyāṉ vētaṉ kaimāṭṭāṅkāṉamaikku Ālattūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Ippaṭi Ivar Aruḷicceyyak kēṭṭēṉ Ivvūr taṭṭārak kāṇi Uṭaiya Āḷ Uriyāṉ Aṟputak kūttap peruntaṭṭāṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Itu maṇalūr kiḻavaṉ pārutāṅkiṉāṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Itu kōṭṭaiyūril kāṇiuṭaiya kōṭināyakaṉ kaimāṭṭāṅkāṉamaikkum Ippaṭikkum Ivai pūṇṭiyuṭaiyāṉ tirunāvukkaracāṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 34.28 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
